title: Smoky Savory Ukrainian Yukon Gold Potato Hash
description: A cultured and fluffy Ukrainian dish featuring Yukon gold potatoes, perfect for meal prep. This recipe is Jain-friendly and cooked on a cedar plank.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the diced potatoes with smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion to the skillet and cook until it is translucent and starting to brown.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Add the potatoes to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the oven and stir in the chopped fresh dill, if using.
Serve the potato hash hot, garnished with additional dill if desired.
Cook the hash on a cedar plank for an additional 5 minutes, if desired, to add smoky flavor.
